title: Building a streaming handler for text to speech simulation
snippet: This tutorial will guide you through creating a serverless function using RunPod's Python SDK that simulates a text-to-speech (TTS) process.

title: How to Create Convincing Human Voices With Bark AI
snippet: Learn how to install and use Bark AI on Runpod to generate realistic, expressive synthetic voices for narration, videos, or voiceover ...

title: Building a Voice Cloning App. with Chatterbox, Next.js, and ...
snippet: We will build a minimal voice cloning app that takes any YouTube URL, extracts the audio, and generates new speech using the original speaker's voice.
